description_long: This is a large, brick school building with a prominent gabled roof and a striking stained glass window feature on one end, suggesting a multi-purpose hall or auditorium. The main entrance is marked by a portico with a triangular pediment supported by columns, providing a formal and welcoming entryway. The exterior walls are primarily constructed of red brick, punctuated by rows of rectangular windows that allow natural light into classrooms and corridors. The stained glass window, composed of vibrant, multi-colored panes, adds a decorative and possibly symbolic element to the structure. The roof is steeply pitched and covered in dark shingles, typical of institutional architecture designed for durability and weather resistance. The building's overall form and materials suggest a blend of traditional and modern influences, suitable for an educational environment in an urban neighborhood.
description: A large red brick school building with a steep gabled roof, prominent stained glass window, and a formal columned entrance. Rows of rectangular windows and a mix of traditional and modern design elements are visible.
description_view_0: This view shows the main entrance with a columned portico and several rows of rectangular windows on the brick facade.
description_view_1: This view highlights the dramatic stained glass window set into the gabled end of the building, framed by light-colored trim.
description_view_2: This side view displays the long brick wall with a series of smaller windows and the side of the entrance portico.
description_view_3: This rear view reveals a plain brick wall with multiple windows and a small covered side entrance.
